tree.name: Jock Landale
tree.narrative: **Jock Landale** has a unique Hawks history — the Australian center originally came to Atlanta as a throw-in with **Dejounte Murray** from San Antonio in 2022, was waived, and then re-acquired from Utah for cash in February 2026. A boomerang Hawk.
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks acquired Landale from Jazz for cash considerations.
tree.note: Australian center, skilled post player. Originally came to ATL with Murray from SAS (2022), waived, then re-acquired from UTA.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.narrative: Cash sent to Utah to bring **Jock Landale** back to Atlanta.
assetsGivenUp.note: Hawks sent cash to Utah for Landale.
